name: Baked Cornish Hens
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the hens with butter.
2. Combine the remaining ingredients and use to baste the hens.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour, basting every 10 minutes with the lemon mixture.
4. If serving with rice, spoon the remaining lemon mixture over the rice.
